name: Lamb Stew w/ Chestnuts & Pomegranates
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Boneless lamb, cut into 1/2" cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a heavy casserole over medium heat.
2. Saute the onions and garlic for 10 minutes.
3. Raise the heat to high and add the lamb cubes, turmeric, salt, and pepper.
4. Brown the meat on all sides.
5. Stir in the saffron, cinnamon, mint, walnuts, tomato paste, and chicken stock.
6. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low.
7. Cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
8. Add lemon juice, pomegranate juice, and chestnuts. Stir well, then cover and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Serve over a bed of saffron yellow rice.
